title: Remote assistance click reliability fix
description:
Remote control clicks now route through Postgres-backed HTTP input (not the WebRTC data channel), use elementsFromPoint hit testing, call .click() on actionable targets, and ignore the support chat widget overlay. One tap message per click instead of mousemove/mousedown/mouseup/click floods.

Who is affected: remote help sessions on pipeshare.live / pipeshare.net.
changeLog: Admin clicks POST to /remote/.../input; customer polls every 40ms.
Single tap event per pointer-up; removed mousemove flood on data channel.
elementsFromPoint + .click() on buttons, rows, menu items.
Support widget pointer-events disabled during remote control on customer.
